Taste Sicilian Pizza & Italian Plates in Nashville
ESTD 2020
St. Vito Focacceria offers unique Sicilian style pizzas referred to as “SFINCIONE”. Nowhere else in Nashville can you try this creative, fun, and delicious style of pizza. It’s truly a one-of-a-kind and epic experience for your taste buds. Come see the team at St. Vito and discover why so many people crave this light, crispy, and mouth-watering pizza! It’s like nothing you’ve ever tasted… we promise. Try our epic plates as well!
Sfincione
Menu
Served whole & by the section
One whole pie is 10"x14" (feeds 6-8) Our pies are cut into six sections which are served as slices.
All sfincione is studded with fontina cheese and finished with pecorino and seasoned breadcrumbs
CLASSIC VITO
milled tomato, oregano
POTATO
potato cream, roasted potato, lemon
PEPPERONI
ezzo pepperoni, chili flake, agrodolce
SPICY TOMATO & BURRATA
giardiniera, calabrian chili oil
Reservations
Private Dining
PLATES
This is a REPRESENTATION of how our menu operates at St Vito Focacceria. We use as much local produce as possible. Everything is made in-house from scratch, and as a result, our menu changes almost daily. We believe this is a great REPRESENTATION of what you can expect when dining with us. The plates change, the pizza stays the same.
SNACKS
Focaccia- garlic, balsamic
Boquerones- catabrian anchovies
Capriolina- sheeps milk cheese, honeycomb
Ricotta- pistachio, bergamot
Cipollini Onions- onion caramel
Dates- n’duja, balsamic
FOR THE TABLE
Crudite- seasonal winter vegetables, tellegio mousse, apple
Torn Olives- celery, pickled raisins, sesame
Caesar- anchovy dressing, pecorino, breadcrumbs
Gnocchi- Nonna style, tomato marinara, sungold
Rigatoni- “Vaccinara” beef shank and oxtail ragu, ricotta salata
Beef Milanese - preserved peppers, sun dried tomato

Things you Should Know
MENU
We change our menu often, but always have our core four sfincione available. If you have any questions regarding allergies or dietary restrictions,
please email us →
‍
We have a fun rotating list of wine, spirits, and beer.
You are welcome to bring in your own bottle of wine. We charge a $36 corkage fee per 750ml bottle.
DO YOU ACCEPT WALK-INS OR RESERVATIONS?
We offer reservations through OPEN TABLE which are released 90 days in advance at 11:00am.
We are a small space and fill up quickly, therefore we recommend walking in during the earlier or later part of the evening.
Due our limited space we ask that the dining experience is limited to 1.5 hours for tables of 2, and 2 hours for any parties of 6 or larger.
PARKING
There is a parking garage on the corner of Overton & Gleaves Street. The address is 1055 Pine Street and the first hour is free. There is also metered parking available on the surrounding streets.
PRIVATE PARTIES & CATERING
Moving forward we do not accept parties larger than 8. We LOVE to host and cater. Please reach out to us about private parties and catering.
almost.southern.nsh@gmail.com
OUR BREAD
Joey Fecci Foundation
Our bread is uniquely delicious because it’s crafted with a naturally leavened sourdough starter, alive for over a decade, imparting deep, complex flavors. The dough, made with a 100% hydration ratio—equal parts flour and water—creates a perfectly balanced texture. Enriched with high fat for a silky, chewy bite and a touch of sugar for subtle sweetness, it ferments up to three days in our walk-in cooler, enhancing its tangy depth. We skip bread proofers, letting the dough naturally proof at ambient temperature for optimal flavor development. Each morning, we portion and bake it fresh, ensuring unmatched quality and freshness in every loaf.
https://joeyfeccifoundation.org/
